steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User reports VPN connection drops every 10 minutes on macOS Sequoia
steps.output_summary: Plan: search internal docs first, then fall back to API lookup for platform-specific fixes

steps.name: search_docs
steps.output_summary: Found doc: KB-3102 VPN Troubleshooting (Windows only). No macOS-specific content.

steps.name: search_api
steps.input_summary: Query vendor support API for VPN client macOS Sequoia known issues
steps.output_summary: API returned advisory: VPN client v4.2.1 has a known keep-alive bug on macOS 15+. Fix available in v4.3.0.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Combine KB-3102 general troubleshooting with vendor advisory about v4.2.1 bug
steps.output_summary: Drafted reply: known bug in VPN client v4.2.1 on macOS 15+, recommend upgrading to v4.3.0, include manual keep-alive workaround in the interim

steps.name: verify
steps.input_summary: Validate response against vendor advisory and KB-3102
steps.output_summary: Response correctly identifies the version bug and recommends upgrade. Workaround is consistent with vendor guidance.

result.label: pass
result.summary: Successfully identified VPN client version bug via API fallback after docs search yielded no macOS results
